message:
fix(core): resolve compilation errors in egress_tap_integration tests

Add missing `mut` to mpsc::channel receiver bindings — tokio's
try_recv() requires &mut self. All 7 egress_tap tests now compile
and pass. Also includes the wezterm.rs clippy fix from previous commit
staging.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
